expectations.text: CollectionView uses a 2-column GridItemsLayout (Span=2 or Columns=2)
DataTemplate includes an Image element bound to a photo or image source property
expectations.evidence: <Image Grid.Row="0" Aspect="AspectFill" Source="{Binding PhotoUrl}"> (in the CollectionView.ItemTemplate DataTemplate)

expectations.text: DataTemplate includes a Label bound to recipe Name and a Label bound to prep time
expectations.evidence: <Label ... Text="{Binding Name}" ...> and <Label FontSize="12" Text="{Binding PrepTimeDisplay}" ...> (PrepTimeDisplay is a computed property on Recipe that formats PrepTimeMinutes)

expectations.text: CollectionView has SelectionMode set to Single
expectations.evidence: <CollectionView Grid.Row="1" ItemsSource="{Binding Recipes}" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedRecipe, Mode=TwoWay}" SelectionMode="Single">

expectations.text: ViewModel has a SelectedRecipe or SelectedItem property with property change notification
expectations.evidence: public Recipe? SelectedRecipe { get => _selectedRecipe; set { if (_selectedRecipe == value) return; _selectedRecipe = value; OnPropertyChanged(); } } with INotifyPropertyChanged implemented

expectations.text: x:DataType compiled bindings are used on the page and/or DataTemplate
expectations.evidence: x:DataType="vm:RecipesViewModel" on ContentPage and x:DataType="models:Recipe" on both the resource DataTemplate and the CollectionView.ItemTemplate DataTemplate

expectations.text: ViewModel uses ObservableCollection<Recipe> for the items source
SelectedItem is bound TwoWay (or uses SelectionChanged event) to the SelectedRecipe property
VisualState Named 'Selected' is defined on the DataTemplate root to highlight selected items
expectations.evidence: No VisualState is defined anywhere in the file. Selection highlighting is implemented via a DataTrigger on the Border: <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding Source={RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type vm:RecipesViewModel}}, Path=SelectedRecipe}" TargetType="Border" Value="{Binding .}"><Setter Property="Stroke" Value="{AppThemeBinding Light=#FF6B35, Dark=#FF8C5A}" />...</DataTrigger>
